# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-api-payments
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payments
        - name: orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-api-internal
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
        - name: inventory

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-api-orders
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
        - name: billing
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-api-internal
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend

---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-api-orders
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
        - name: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-api-billing
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: billing

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: billing-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: billing
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: billing-api-payments
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: billing-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payments
        - name: orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: billing-api-admin
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: billing-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: billing

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-api-public
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress
        - name: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-api-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
        - name: payments
        - name: inventory
        - name: billing
